name: Brain Dump Mode

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Introducing new feature: Shark mode 🦈

Key Features:
- **Shark mode**: Escape from the hungry shark 🦈! The shark will chase you if your typing speed falls below the target. Keep typing fast to stay ahead of the shark and avoid becoming its lunch 🩸. The faster you type, the farther you'll swim from the shark. 🏊‍♂️💨

This release is compatible with Obsidian app versions 0.15.0 and above. We hope you enjoy the thrill of escaping the shark while boosting your typing speed and productivity! 🚀

Happy writing, and stay safe from the shark! 🦈

releases.author: yesjinu
releases.description:
I am excited to announce the initial release of the Brain Dump Mode plugin, version 1.0.0. This plugin is designed to help you overcome perfectionism and get your thoughts down quickly and efficiently.

**Key Features:**
- **Disable Delete Key**: Once activated, the delete key is disabled, encouraging you to keep writing without second-guessing yourself.

This release is compatible with obsidian app versions 0.15.0 and above. We hope this tool helps you in your writing journey by allowing you to focus on getting your ideas out without the pressure of immediate perfection. Happy writing!
